item.description: Hi! I am Ana Ezquerro, a second-year student in the Master in Artificial Intelligence at University of A Coruña and a full-time researcher at LyS Group. I obtained my bachelor degree in Data Science and Engineering in 2023. My previous research covers Time Series Analysis and Machine Learning algorithms and right now I am working in Graph and Tree (Incremental) Parsing and Multimodal learning. I am also planning a PhD degree on Human-like Incremental Language Representations.

Honors 2019. Best Academic Records for the University Test Access in Galicia offered by the University of Santiago de Compostela. 2022. Department Collaboration Scholarship offered by the University of A Coruña and Banco Santander. 2022. Awards for Academic Excellence in Bachelor’s Degrees 2020-21 offered by Xunta de Galicia. 2023. Awards for Academic Excellence in Bachelor’s Degrees 2021-22 offered by Xunta de Galicia.

Research Dependency Graph Parsing as Sequence Labeling Ana Ezquerro, David Vilares and Carlos Gómez-Rodríguez In the 2024 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP 2024) preprint | code | slides | poster LyS at SemEval 2024 Task 3. An Early Prototype for End‑to‑End Multimodal Emotion Linking as Graph‑Based Parsing Ana Ezquerro and David Vilares In the 18th International Workshop on Semantic Evaluation (SemEval 2024) co‑located with the 2024 Annual Conference of the North American Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics (NACL 2024)

Education 2014-2015: Piano Professional Degree at Xan Viaño Professional Conservatory of Music. 2019-2023: Data Science and Engineering Degree at University of A Coruña. Honor distinction in the Final Degree Project: “Fully Incremental Parsing based on Neural Networks”. 2023-Present: Master in Artificial Intelligence at University of A Coruña. Experience 07/2021-09/2021 (full-time): Research Assistant at Centre for Information and Communications Technology Research (CITIC).
